capability: factual verification and calibrated execution claims
weakness: The baseline accepts unsupported statements about deployments, tests, training, current facts and numerical results.

dataset.origin: synthetic adversarial cases authored for this experiment

compute.reason: No connected GPU or promoted adapter artifact was available; executable cognitive component path used.

rollback: Remove claim-verifier-v1.mjs and its caller; no migrations or model weights are changed.
promotion: candidate-only until CI executes the hidden test split and runtime integration is evaluated
